hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && { [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] && echo '{}' && exit 0; }; git add -A && git commit -m "$(printf 'Auto-commit: session changes\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>')" --quiet && git push --quiet 2>&1; echo '{"systemMessage": "Auto-committed and pushed changes"}'
